text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
141 
GAP_TIER 
LABEL: 
Indicates Whether Tier is Covered in the Gap Phase 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the formulary tier has extra coverage in the during the coverage gap phase. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 
N = No 
COMMENT: 
The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit.
